prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
This page contains the BEGINNING of "Item 1. Business".
Find that section's heading on the page, then transcribe VERBATIM the first 5 lines of its body text that follow the heading (ignore running headers, page numbers, footers).
Respond with ONLY a JSON object: {"lines": ["line 1", "line 2", ...]}
text:
```json
{
  "lines": [
    "General",
    "Richardson Electronics, Ltd. (the “Company,” “we,” “we,” “our”) is a leading global manufacturer of engineered solutions, green energy products,",
    "power grid and microwave tubes, and related consumables; power conversion and RF and microwave components including green energy solutions; tubes",
    "tubes for diagnostic imaging equipment; and customized display solutions. More than 55% of our products are manufactured in LaFox, Illinois,",
    "Marlborough, Massachusetts, or Donauscheingen, Germany, or by one of our manufacturing partners throughout the world. All of our partners"
  ]
}
```
